hooks.command: cmd=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if [ -n "$cmd" ] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm[[:space:]]+-rf|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+.*(-f[[:space:]]|--force)|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|--no-verify|git[[:space:]]+commit[[:space:]]+--amend|git[[:space:]]+clean[[:space:]]+-[a-z]*f'; then echo 'BLOCKED: CLAUDE.md 절대 금지 명령어 — 필요하면 터미널에서 직접 실행하세요' >&2; exit 2; fi
